title: Building with Claude: Agentic AI in the Enterprise
abstract: A technical-forward talk on agentic AI systems — what they are, how they work, and where they create the most value in enterprise environments. Covers real examples from production deployments, with lessons on trust, oversight, and keeping humans in the loop.
objectives: Understand agent design patterns: planner, executor, critic
Identify where agentic systems create enterprise value versus overhead
Design oversight and escalation patterns that keep humans in control
takeaways: A trust-and-oversight checklist for agentic deployments
Cost and latency tuning strategies for always-on workflows
